vocab.meaning: ở một đẳng cấp cao hơn/tốt hơn một chút
vocab.example: To me, the panoramic views of a misty valley are a notch above the repetitive glass facades of a city center.
The sight of ancient ruins nestled in the countryside really captures the imagination in a way that modern offices simply cannot.
For those who love architecture, the night-time view of a neon-lit skyline is second to none.

vocab.meaning: thu được thành quả (sau khi nỗ lực đi xa/leo núi)
vocab.example: If you are willing to hike for hours into the wilderness, you truly reap the rewards when you see the untouched horizon.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó phải dừng lại ngay lập tức (vì kinh ngạc)
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the skyscrapers in New York is enough to stop any first-time visitor in their tracks.

vocab.meaning: tất cả mọi người/không ngoại trừ ai
vocab.example: The beauty of a seaside sunset is something that appeals to all and sundry, regardless of whether they prefer urban or rural life.

vocab.meaning: làm điều gì đó một cách triệt để/tới bến
vocab.example: Instead of just visiting a park, I’d rather go the whole hog and travel to a remote national park for the ultimate rural view.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó cực kỳ kinh ngạc
vocab.example: The bird's-eye view from a penthouse apartment can absolutely blow your mind with its sheer complexity.
I prefer urban views because having world-class landmarks within striking distance of my balcony is incredibly convenient.

vocab.meaning: xác nhận/đảm bảo cho chất lượng của điều gì
vocab.example: I can personally vouch for the therapeutic effects of looking out over a calm, rural lake after a stressful week.
